title: Xu Ting
content:
Xu Ting
 is the successor of the 
Xu Family
 of 
Planet Dong Lin
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
. Like most members of the Xu Family, he is a vicious and bloodthirsty man who would slaughter another for so much as making eye contact with him.

History
[
]

He participated in the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
's 108 Celestial Titles trial and took second place in the human, earth, and heaven trials after 
Wang Lin
. He also lost to Wang Lin in the one line to heaven trial so he believes Wang Lin to be his rival as he has never lost to someone his age before. But even more so, he has a dense desire to kill Wang Lin as the latter overshadowed his glory, multiple times.

He accepted the baptism of the Celestial Bestowment pool and gave up his domain so that he could grow more powerful and gain the upper hand against Wang Lin.
